title: RoundCheck
description: The chair's summary and convergence judgement after a Phase 2 round.

summary.description: Where the room stands after this round.

converged.description: True ONLY if no member changed their preferred option this round AND no new substantive objection appeared. Mere majority is not convergence.

rationale.description: Why converged is true or false — name the member(s) still moving or the new objection if not converged.
